title: Eskom Integrated Report 2024
description: Eskom FY2024 Integrated Report — draft pending audit completion. Includes financial statements, generation performance, and Just Energy Transition progress.

title: Eskom Generation Recovery Plan 2024-2026
description: Eskom's Generation Recovery Plan targeting 70% EAF by end 2025 through accelerated maintenance, contractor management, and plant performance improvements.

title: Transnet Freight Rail Recovery Plan 2024-2026
description: Transnet Freight Rail Recovery Plan targeting 230 Mtpa by FY2026 through locomotive availability improvement, cable theft mitigation, and port efficiency enhancement.

title: Denel Annual Report 2024
description: Denel FY2024 Annual Report — first profitable year since FY2017. Includes financial statements, contract pipeline, and recapitalisation utilisation report.

companyName: South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL)
title: SANRAL Annual Report 2024
description: SANRAL FY2024 Annual Report — fifth consecutive clean audit. Includes financial statements, road network performance, and N2 Wild Coast Highway progress.

companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa (PRASA)
title: PRASA Infrastructure Rehabilitation Plan 2024-2028
description: PRASA's 5-year infrastructure rehabilitation plan targeting restoration of 80% of commuter rail network by 2028, with priority corridors identified and phased investment plan.
